message: Let's work together for a fair price. What's your ideal ask?
I'm looking for a mutually beneficial price around 75-80. This should give us both good value while ensuring consistent trades throughout our 20 rounds together.
My ask of 77 was reasonable but we missed a trade. I'm willing to come down slightly to around 72-75 to find common ground while still maintaining profitable margins.
My max bid is 63. Let's aim for a midpoint around 60-65 for a fair and sustainable trade.
I see you're capping at 63. With my costs, I need at least 65 to make this worthwhile. Can you stretch to 65? That gives us a trade at 65 midpoint.
I cannot bid above 63. Ask 63 or less for a trade. Mutual benefit requires price <=63.
I understand you're firm at 63. Since we've had no trades yet, I'll meet you there. Let's both bid/ask 63 to guarantee a trade and start building value for our remaining rounds.
I will bid 63 this round. For future rounds, ask must be below 63 for me to trade.
You bid 62 last round after saying 63! I kept my word at 63. I need at least 55 to make any profit. Can you bid 55 so we finally trade?
I bid 63 last round, not 62. My valuation is 63. I will only bid 63. Ask 63 or lower to trade.
I will bid 55 this round. Ask 55 and we trade.
